<!-- Auto-generated by script/generate-cli-docs.ts — do not edit manually -->

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `cypher acp` | start ACP (Agent Client Protocol) server |
| `cypher mcp` | manage MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers |
| `cypher [project]` | start cypher tui |
| `cypher attach <url>` | attach to a running cypher server |
| `cypher run [message..]` | run cypher with a message |
| `cypher debug` | debugging and troubleshooting tools |
| `cypher auth` | manage AI providers and credentials |
| `cypher agent` | manage agents |
| `cypher upgrade [target]` | upgrade cypher to the latest or a specific version |
| `cypher uninstall` | uninstall cypher and remove all related files |
| `cypher serve` | starts a headless cypher server |
| `cypher web` | start cypher server and open web interface |
| `cypher models [provider]` | list all available models |
| `cypher roll-call <filter>` | batch-test text models matching a filter for connectivity and latency |
| `cypher profile` | show Cypher account profile |
| `cypher stats` | show token usage and cost statistics |
| `cypher export [sessionID]` | export session data as JSON |
| `cypher import <file>` | import session data from JSON file or URL |
| `cypher github` | manage GitHub agent |
| `cypher pr <number>` | fetch and checkout a GitHub PR branch, then run cypher |
| `cypher session` | manage sessions |
| `cypher remote` | enable remote connection for real-time session relay |
| `cypher daemon` | manage the local cypher daemon |
| `cypher console` | open or stop the local Cypher Console |
| `cypher db` | database tools |
| `cypher config` | configuration tools |
| `cypher plugin <module>` | install plugin and update config |
| `cypher help [command]` | show full CLI reference |
| `cypher completion` | generate shell completion script |
